description: The look of this murcia bag is contemporary and the feel is of pure luxury. Created using exotic material, intricate embroideries and international silhouettes, it's vibrant hues and rich textures are just some of the unique features of this murcia bag. This bag is a must have for every woman with style and panache for fashion.Made of fabric with brocade workDurable nylon liningOne main magnetic buttoned chamber with a sub-chamber insideMobile case on the insideComfortable handles scooped out form the main bodyBag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a mild leather cleaner
